content:
I need to multiply 926 × 277 in base 11.

Let me convert to base 10 first, multiply, then convert back to base 11.

926₁₁ to base 10:
9×11² + 2×11¹ + 6×11⁰ = 9×121 + 2×11 + 6×1 = 1089 + 22 + 6 = 1117₁₀

277₁₁ to base 10:
2×11² + 7×11¹ + 7×11⁰ = 2×121 + 7×11 + 7×1 = 242 + 77 + 7 = 326₁₀

Multiply in base 10:
1117 × 326 = 364,142₁₀

Convert 364,142₁₀ to base 11:
364142 ÷ 11 = 33,103 remainder 9
33103 ÷ 11 = 3,009 remainder 4
3009 ÷ 11 = 273 remainder 6
273 ÷ 11 = 24 remainder 9
24 ÷ 11 = 2 remainder 2
2 ÷ 11 = 0 remainder 2

Reading the remainders from bottom to top: 226949₁₁

Let me verify: 2×11⁵ + 2×11⁴ + 6×11³ + 9×11² + 4×11¹ + 9×11⁰
= 2×161051 + 2×14641 + 6×1331 + 9×121 + 4×11 + 9
= 322102 + 29282 + 7986 + 1089 + 44 + 9
= 360512... 

Let me recalculate the conversion:
364142 ÷ 11 = 33103 R 9
33103 ÷ 11 = 3009 R 4
3009 ÷ 11 = 273 R 6
273 ÷ 11 = 24 R 9
24 ÷ 11 = 2 R 2
2 ÷ 11 = 0 R 2

226949
